format: ALEX/JORDAN dialog, plain text, no markdown, no stage directions
notes: Episode 4 'This Race'. Walks the 2026 D19 Democratic primary field: slate (Sen Kramer, Del Crutchfield, Del Stewart) plus open Cullison seat with Christa Tichy filed and Sunil Dasgupta + Christopher Jennison considering. Five policy axes identified: Blueprint/fiscal, criminal justice, housing/zoning, transit/Metro, Wootton/MCPS. Listener-flagged-topics-in-this-race summary: sanctuary policy (slate likely supports MD's existing framework), fiscal restriction (Crutchfield is NOT this, listener should look at open-seat field), Wootton (state legislative venue is District 15 not D19, structural question for forum), property tax (county-government question, not D19 state ballot — proper venue is Council District 7 ballot). Closes with if-she-wins-what-changes (continuity of slate model + corrections-subcommittee chair). Avoid-list respected. Length target met.
